violations.text: A bucket was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed bucket from hand washing sink at time of inspection. Proper hand-washing sink usage reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk-in cooler) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Observed unnecessary debris inside dumpster enclosure. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE (dumpster), recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained cleaned and free of unnecessary items. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Observed several floor tiles in the (retail) area in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC store will be going through renovations in July. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Rags were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing and shall be maintained so that it is accessible at all times for EMPLOYEE use. The hand sink was cleared at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels made available at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
An accumulation of debris was observed surrounding the dumpster. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
